Setting.Name: NIS Zulassen

Description.source: Controls whether the Sharpen filter is allowed. OpenGL defaults to allowed, while DX9, DX11, and DX12 default to disabled. If the active application is designated to run on the discrete GPU through Optimus, sharpening is allowed.

Name.source: OpenGL - Default DX present policy for MSHybrid configurations

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Standard DX present policy for MSHybrid configurations

Description.source: Controls default DX present policy for MSHybrid configurations. Note that disabling DX present here does not prevent it from getting enabled for some other reason (e.g. HDR). RS2 is the first version that supports Win7-blit (providing effecient MSHybrid support). RS4 is the first version with a fix for diagonal tearing bug 200050074.

Setting.Description: Controls default DX present policy for MSHybrid configurations. Note that disabling DX present here does not prevent it from getting enabled for some other reason (e.g. HDR). RS2 is the first version that supports Win7-blit (providing effecient MSHybrid support). RS4 is the first version with a fix for diagonal tearing bug 200050074.

Value.source: DISABLE - Disable DX present (still allowed for hdr).

Values.Value: DISABLE - Disable DX present (still allowed for hdr).

Value.source: USE_WIN7_BLIT_FOR_GDI_COMPAT - Disable DX present when GDI compatibility needed for MSHybrid on Win10 >= RS2 (see OGL_ENABLE_GDI_COMPATIBILITY/__lhglDetermineGdiCompatibility).

Values.Value: USE_WIN7_BLIT_FOR_GDI_COMPAT - Disable DX present when GDI compatibility needed for MSHybrid on Win10 >= RS2 (see OGL_ENABLE_GDI_COMPATIBILITY/__lhglDetermineGdiCompatibility).

Value.source: DISABLE_RS4 - Disable DX present on Win10 >= RS4.

Values.Value: DISABLE_RS4 - Disable DX present on Win10 >= RS4.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - GDI over OpenGL Mixing

Description.source: Some applications render GDI on top OpenGL content. There is limited support for this with blit model, but with flip model (can be used by dxPresent path), mixing GDI and other rendering is not supported. In fact the first flip model present to a window permanently disables GDI rendering support for that window. Enabling mixing here prevents the dxPresent path from using flip model when possible (note that diagonal tearing is possible due to bug 200050074). Enabling this is not necessary for applications that use a SUPPORT_GDI pixelformat.

Setting.Description: Some applications render GDI on top OpenGL content. There is limited support for this with blit model, but with flip model (can be used by dxPresent path), mixing GDI and other rendering is not supported. In fact the first flip model present to a window permanently disables GDI rendering support for that window. Enabling mixing here prevents the dxPresent path from using flip model when possible (note that diagonal tearing is possible due to bug 200050074). Enabling this is not necessary for applications that use a SUPPORT_GDI pixelformat.

Value.source: AUTO - Use driver heuristic to determine mode.

Values.Value: AUTO - Use driver heuristic to determine mode.

Name.source: OpenGL - Affects driver teardown behavior when

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Affects driver teardown behavior when

Description.source:
Affects driver teardown behavior when (lpReserved != NULL), which
indicates that one or more thread may have been terminated prior to
PROCESS_DETACH. In this case attempting to clean up has undefined
results, including the possibility of a hang or a crash.

Setting.Description:
Affects driver teardown behavior when (lpReserved != NULL), which
indicates that one or more thread may have been terminated prior to
PROCESS_DETACH. In this case attempting to clean up has undefined
results, including the possibility of a hang or a crash.

Value.source: DISABLED - Don't attempt process teardown if lpReserved != NULL, unless CycleStats is enabled

Values.Value: DISABLED - Don't attempt process teardown if lpReserved != NULL, unless CycleStats is enabled

Name.source: Shader Cache Control Flags For Automated Testing

Setting.Name: Staging Cache Größe

Description.source: Map() of staging buffer without DISCARD or NO_OVERWRITE is a problem unless we can map cached copy. Smaller values can cause uncached maps to stall but larger values incur lots of memcpy() overhead. Testing has found 8kb to be a sensible tradeoff (Outlook in sensitive to larger values). SLI uses a minimum value of 4mb.

Setting.Description: Map() of staging buffer without DISCARD or NO_OVERWRITE is a problem unless we can map cached copy. Smaller values can cause uncached maps to stall but larger values incur lots of memcpy() overhead. Testing has found 8kb to be a sensible tradeoff (Outlook in sensitive to larger values). SLI uses a minimum value of 4mb.

This bit allowed P2P for such cases.

This bit allowed P2P for such cases.

Setting.Name: Stereo - Profile Aktivieren

Description.source: Enables or disables the NVIDIA stereo profile path.

Setting.Description: Enables or disables the NVIDIA stereo profile path.

Setting.Name: Stereo - VR Unterstützung Flags

Description.source: Flags related to VR Support

Setting.Description: Flags related to VR Support

Value.source: 0 - Default value. Used for all non-VR (Desktop-only) apps.

Values.Value: 0 - Default value. Used for all non-VR (Desktop-only) apps.

Value.source: 1 - For VR-only apps. This will blacklist the app for Stereo (3D Vision). NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with DESKTOP_VR_DUAL_MODE_APP and VR_RUNTIME_COMPONENT and STEREO_VR_APP.

Values.Value: 1 - For VR-only apps. This will blacklist the app for Stereo (3D Vision). NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with DESKTOP_VR_DUAL_MODE_APP and VR_RUNTIME_COMPONENT and STEREO_VR_APP.

Value.source: 2 - For apps that have both - VR and Desktop Mode. NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with VR_ONLY_APP and VR_RUNTIME_COMPONENT.

Values.Value: 2 - For apps that have both - VR and Desktop Mode. NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with VR_ONLY_APP and VR_RUNTIME_COMPONENT.

Value.source: 4 - For executables that are part of a VR Runtime. NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with DESKTOP_ONLY_APP and DESKTOP_VR_DUAL_MODE_APP and STEREO_VR_APP.

Values.Value: 4 - For executables that are part of a VR Runtime. NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with DESKTOP_ONLY_APP and DESKTOP_VR_DUAL_MODE_APP and STEREO_VR_APP.

Value.source: 8 - For executables those do not want to block NV Stereo while running in VR enviornment. NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with VR_RUNTIME_COMPONENT and VR_ONLY_APP.

Values.Value: 8 - For executables those do not want to block NV Stereo while running in VR enviornment. NOTE: This bit is MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with VR_RUNTIME_COMPONENT and VR_ONLY_APP.

Setting.Name: Stereo-Anzeigemodus

Description.source: Display mode to use when stereo is enabled

Setting.Description: Display mode to use when stereo is enabled

Value.source: SHUTTER_GLASSES - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via DDC adapter shutter glasses (ELSA Revelator)

Values.Value: SHUTTER_GLASSES - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via DDC adapter shutter glasses (ELSA Revelator)

Value.source: VERTICAL_INTERLACED - Passive stereo mode vertical interlaced

Values.Value: VERTICAL_INTERLACED - Passive stereo mode vertical interlaced

Value.source: TWINVIEW - Passive stereo mode clone mode

Values.Value: TWINVIEW - Passive stereo mode clone mode

Value.source: NV17_SHUTTER_GLASSES_DAC0 - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via 3-pin mini-DIN DAC0

Values.Value: NV17_SHUTTER_GLASSES_DAC0 - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via 3-pin mini-DIN DAC0

Value.source: NV17_SHUTTER_GLASSES_DAC1 - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via 3-pin mini-DIN DAC1

Values.Value: NV17_SHUTTER_GLASSES_DAC1 - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via 3-pin mini-DIN DAC1

Value.source: COLOR_LINE - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via blue line adapter (StereoGraphics)

Values.Value: COLOR_LINE - Active stereo mode frame interleaved shutter glasses via blue line adapter (StereoGraphics)

Value.source: COLOR_INTERLEAVED - Passive stereo mode color interleaved (Sharp 3D)

Values.Value: COLOR_INTERLEAVED - Passive stereo mode color interleaved (Sharp 3D)

Value.source: ANAGLYPH - Passive stereo mode colored anaglyph (left:red right:cyan(blue+green))

Values.Value: ANAGLYPH - Passive stereo mode colored anaglyph (left:red right:cyan(blue+green))

Value.source: HORIZONTAL_INTERLACED - Passive stereo mode horizontal interlaced (Arisawa/Hyundai/Zalman/Pavione/Miracube)

Values.Value: HORIZONTAL_INTERLACED - Passive stereo mode horizontal interlaced (Arisawa/Hyundai/Zalman/Pavione/Miracube)

Value.source: SIDE_FIELD - Passive stereo mode vertical subfield (Pavione/Miracube)

Values.Value: SIDE_FIELD - Passive stereo mode vertical subfield (Pavione/Miracube)

Value.source: SUB_FIELD - Passive stereo mode horizontal subfield (Pavione/Miracube)

Values.Value: SUB_FIELD - Passive stereo mode horizontal subfield (Pavione/Miracube)

Value.source: CHECKERBOARD - Passive stereo mode checkerboard pattern (3D DLP)

Values.Value: CHECKERBOARD - Passive stereo mode checkerboard pattern (3D DLP)

Value.source: INVERSE_CHECKERBOARD - Passive stereo mode inverse checkerboard pattern (3D DLP)

Values.Value: INVERSE_CHECKERBOARD - Passive stereo mode inverse checkerboard pattern (3D DLP)

Value.source: TRIDELITY_SL - Passive stereo mode line-wise biased vertical interlaced (Tridelity SL/SV -> SingleView)

Values.Value: TRIDELITY_SL - Passive stereo mode line-wise biased vertical interlaced (Tridelity SL/SV -> SingleView)

Value.source: TRIDELITY_MV - Passive stereo mode slanted line-wise biased vertical interlaced 5 view (Tridelity MV -> MultiView)

Values.Value: TRIDELITY_MV - Passive stereo mode slanted line-wise biased vertical interlaced 5 view (Tridelity MV -> MultiView)

Value.source: SEEFRONT - Passive stereo mode using Seefront pattern (SeeFront)

Values.Value: SEEFRONT - Passive stereo mode using Seefront pattern (SeeFront)

Value.source: STEREO_MIRROR - Passive stereo mode clone mode with right eye mirrored (Planar)

Values.Value: STEREO_MIRROR - Passive stereo mode clone mode with right eye mirrored (Planar)

Value.source: FRAME_SEQUENTIAL - Active stereo mode frame interleaved (NVIDIA 3D Vision)

Values.Value: FRAME_SEQUENTIAL - Active stereo mode frame interleaved (NVIDIA 3D Vision)

Value.source: AUTODETECT_PASSIVE_MODE - Passive stereo mode autodetected by monitor capabilities

Values.Value: AUTODETECT_PASSIVE_MODE - Passive stereo mode autodetected by monitor capabilities

Value.source: AEGIS_DT_FRAME_SEQUENTIAL - Active stereo mode frame interleaved (NVIDIA AegisDT embedded emitter)

Values.Value: AEGIS_DT_FRAME_SEQUENTIAL - Active stereo mode frame interleaved (NVIDIA AegisDT embedded emitter)

Value.source: OEM_EMITTER_FRAME_SEQUENTIAL - Active stereo mode frame interleaved (GPIO connected OEM emitter)

Values.Value: OEM_EMITTER_FRAME_SEQUENTIAL - Active stereo mode frame interleaved (GPIO connected OEM emitter)

Value.source: DP_INBAND - Active stereo mode frame interleaved via DisplayPort inband MSA signal

Values.Value: DP_INBAND - Active stereo mode frame interleaved via DisplayPort inband MSA signal

Value.source: USE_HW_DEFAULT - Select hardware default based on capabilities

Values.Value: USE_HW_DEFAULT - Hardwarestandard anhand der Fähigkeiten wählen

Setting.Name: Experimentell - Root Table Promotion Timing

Description.source: Controls when the we promote descriptor table entries to the root table

Setting.Description: Controls when the we promote descriptor table entries to the root table

Value.source: DISABLED - Default D3D12 behavior - no promotion

Values.Value: DISABLED - Default D3D12 behavior - no promotion

Value.source: CBV_GRAPHICS - Promote CBV descriptors from descriptor tables to the root table for graphics

Values.Value: CBV_GRAPHICS - Promote CBV descriptors from descriptor tables to the root table for graphics

Value.source: CBV_COMPUTE - Promote CBV descriptors from descriptor tables to the root table for compute

Values.Value: CBV_COMPUTE - Promote CBV descriptors from descriptor tables to the root table for compute

Value.source: PROMOTE_UNINITIALIZED - Promote descriptor table entries, even if they are uninitialized (due to root signature changes etc

Values.Value: PROMOTE_UNINITIALIZED - Promote descriptor table entries, even if they are uninitialized (due to root signature changes etc

Setting.Name: Experimentell - Shader Disk Cache Directory

Description.source: If specified, shader disk cache will be stored in this directory

Setting.Description: If specified, shader disk cache will be stored in this directory

Name.source: Experimental - The amount of VA space in bytes reserved for the shader heap

Setting.Name: Experimentell - The amount of VA space in Byte reserved for the Shader heap

Description.source: Sets the amount of VA space in bytes reserved for the shader heap (must be in multiple of 64kb). This is only on Win10+ for Dx1X & Dx12 ( Dx1X requires SHADER_HEAP_MULTIBLOCK_ENABLE ). There are separate default enums for DX11 and DX12 (DX12 requires additional space for DXR shaders) which should be selected at runtime

Setting.Description: Sets the amount of VA space in bytes reserved for the shader heap (must be in multiple of 64kb). This is only on Win10+ for Dx1X & Dx12 ( Dx1X requires SHADER_HEAP_MULTIBLOCK_ENABLE ). There are separate default enums for DX11 and DX12 (DX12 requires additional space for DXR shaders) which should be selected at runtime

Setting.Name: Experimentell - Constant Tracking Volatility Threshold

Description.source: if our volatility factor exceeds this threshold, stop tracking the const

Setting.Description: if our volatility factor exceeds this threshold, stop tracking the const

Name.source: Experimental - Comma-separated list of scheduler names

Setting.Name: Experimentell - Comma-separated list of scheduler names

Description.source: Comma-separated list of scheduler names, corrseponding to the list of shader names specified by DXR_RAYGEN_SCHEDULER_OVERRIDE_PATTERNS. If fewer elements than pattern list, last entry is used for remaining patterns.

Setting.Description: Comma-separated list of scheduler names, corrseponding to the list of shader names specified by DXR_RAYGEN_SCHEDULER_OVERRIDE_PATTERNS. If fewer elements than pattern list, last entry is used for remaining patterns.

Setting.Name: Experimentell - Applies OCGknob RelaxConvBlockDef=1

Description.source: Applies OCGknob RelaxConvBlockDef=1. Applied only to TU10x+. Will be ignored if knobString or knobFile is specified.

Setting.Description: Applies OCGknob RelaxConvBlockDef=1. Applied only to TU10x+. Will be ignored if knobString or knobFile is specified.

Values.Value: HAZARD_CHECK_ALL_BARRIERS - All barrier types trigger a hazard check

Value.source: VALIDATE_SCRATCH_AND_RTAS_MEM - Check for missed scratch and RTAS hazards before every build and issue additional barriers as needed

Values.Value: VALIDATE_SCRATCH_AND_RTAS_MEM - Check for missed scratch and RTAS hazards before every build and issue additional barriers as needed

Value.source: FLUSH_ON_COPY - Flush bvh builds on every copyRTAS call

Values.Value: FLUSH_ON_COPY - Flush bvh builds on every copyRTAS call

Value.source: FLUSH_ON_EMIT - Flush bvh builds on every emitRTAS call

Values.Value: FLUSH_ON_EMIT - Flush bvh builds on every emitRTAS call

Value.source: FLUSH_ON_DISPATCHRAYS - Flush bvh builds on every dispatchRays call

Values.Value: FLUSH_ON_DISPATCHRAYS - Flush bvh builds on every dispatchRays call

Value.source: IGNORE_VA_RANGES - Flush bvh builds whenever a barrier is issued

Values.Value: IGNORE_VA_RANGES - Flush bvh builds whenever a barrier is issued

Value.source: FORCE_SINGLE_BATCH - Forces a flush immediately after batching. Effectively forces batch size of 1

Values.Value: FORCE_SINGLE_BATCH - Forces a flush immediately after batching. Effectively forces batch size of 1

Setting.Name: Experimentell - Modus für geringe Latenz Einstellungen

Description.source: Low latency mode settings. Disabled by default (to enable set VSYNCMODE=VIRTUAL). When enabled this provides a mode which is similar to 'vsync ON' - i.e, no tearing, but has fps/latency similar to 'vsync OFF'. The idea is to let the app render as fast it can and present the latest frame at vblank. The BLEND mode enables temporal supersampling using a exponential decay filter by making use of the additional rendered frames to smoothen out the animation.

Setting.Description: Low latency mode settings. Disabled by default (to enable set VSYNCMODE=VIRTUAL). When enabled this provides a mode which is similar to 'vsync ON' - i.e, no tearing, but has fps/latency similar to 'vsync OFF'. The idea is to let the app render as fast it can and present the latest frame at vblank. The BLEND mode enables temporal supersampling using a exponential decay filter by making use of the additional rendered frames to smoothen out the animation.

Value.source: ALLOW - Allows LOW Latency VSync (Fast Sync). Set this bit to 0 for denylisting the app.

Values.Value: ALLOW - Allows LOW Latency VSync (Fast Sync). Set this bit to 0 for denylisting the app.

Value.source: BLEND - Enable Blending. Might result in slightly higher latency but smoother animation. Use LOW_LATENCY_BLEND_FACTOR to control blending factor.

Values.Value: BLEND - Enable Blending. Might result in slightly higher latency but smoother animation. Use LOW_LATENCY_BLEND_FACTOR to control blending factor.

Value.source: DYNAMIC_FPS_CAP - Enable Dynamic fps limit to cap to a multiple of refresh rate.

Values.Value: DYNAMIC_FPS_CAP - Enable Dynamic fps limit to cap to a multiple of refresh rate.

Value.source: COLLAPSE_FLIP - Enable Display hardware's collapseFlip mechanism to pick the latest rendered frame.

Values.Value: COLLAPSE_FLIP - Enable Display hardware's collapseFlip mechanism to pick the latest rendered frame.

Setting.Name: Experimentell - Deferred Barrier Execution

Description.source: Defer barriers until needed.

Setting.Description: Defer barriers until needed.

Value.source: DEFER_ALL - Defer barriers until needed by next draw/dispatch/copy

Values.Value: DEFER_ALL - Defer barriers until needed by next draw/dispatch/copy

Value.source: DEFER_ALL_UNTIL_PCAS - DEFER ALL but also defer compute until PCAS. Experimental.

Values.Value: DEFER_ALL_UNTIL_PCAS - DEFER ALL but also defer compute until PCAS. Experimental.

Value.source: DEFER_ALL_CROSS_CL_DEFERRAL - DEFER ALL plus cross CL deferral. Defer resolving end of CL barriers until ECL time

Values.Value: DEFER_ALL_CROSS_CL_DEFERRAL - DEFER ALL plus cross CL deferral. Defer resolving end of CL barriers until ECL time

Value.source: DEFER_ALL_PRE_CROSS_CL_DEFERRAL - DEFER ALL with cross cl deferral enabled, plus defer CL barriers until ECL time. Experimental.

Values.Value: DEFER_ALL_PRE_CROSS_CL_DEFERRAL - DEFER ALL with cross cl deferral enabled, plus defer CL barriers until ECL time. Experimental.

Value.source: DEFER_ALL_NO_GRAPHICS_OPTIMIZATIONS - DEFER_ALL but with graphics optimizations turned off. For experiments.

Values.Value: DEFER_ALL_NO_GRAPHICS_OPTIMIZATIONS - DEFER_ALL but with graphics optimizations turned off. For experiments.

Value.source: DEFER_ALL_DISCARD_IN_DISPATCH_TABLE - DEFER ALL but always resolve pending syncs through dispatch table, regardless if discard is NOP or not. For experiments.

Values.Value: DEFER_ALL_DISCARD_IN_DISPATCH_TABLE - DEFER ALL but always resolve pending syncs through dispatch table, regardless if discard is NOP or not. For experiments.

Value.source: DO_ONLY_SYNC_NO_DEFERRAL - Do all the synchronization and invalidation immediately at the end of the barrier DDI, and don't defer them. For debugging.

Values.Value: DO_ONLY_SYNC_NO_DEFERRAL - Do all the synchronization and invalidation immediately at the end of the barrier DDI, and don't defer them. For debugging.

Value.source: NO_WFI_REMOVAL - Don't use reference value to remove any barriers, but always issue the synchronization

Values.Value: NO_WFI_REMOVAL - Don't use reference value to remove any barriers, but always issue the synchronization

Value.source: KEEP_REDUNDANT_BARRIERS - Don't remove redundant (readonly->readonly subset) barriers

Setting.Name: Experimentell - Sample Interleave Settings

Description.source: additional settings for the sample interleave feature

Setting.Description: additional settings for the sample interleave feature

Value.source: SAMPLES_FROM_FILE - Do not use our default patterns but get the sample positions from a file specified in MAXWELL_B_FRAME_SAMPLE_POSITION_INTERLEAVE_PATH

Values.Value: SAMPLES_FROM_FILE - Do not use our default patterns but get the sample positions from a file specified in MAXWELL_B_FRAME_SAMPLE_POSITION_INTERLEAVE_PATH

Value.source: DISABLE_ON_SQUARE_TARGETS - Disable the effect on square rendertargets, the rationale being they might be used to encode shadow maps

Values.Value: DISABLE_ON_SQUARE_TARGETS - Disable the effect on square rendertargets, the rationale being they might be used to encode shadow maps

Value.source: DISABLE_DITHERING - Some games are incompatible with a sample pattern that varies per pixel position. So disable this for this game

Values.Value: DISABLE_DITHERING - Some games are incompatible with a sample pattern that varies per pixel position. So disable this for this game

Value.source: DECOMPRESS_DEPTH_ON_TEXTURE_READ - L2 from texture is unable to interpret non standard sample positions for depth, so we need to decompress them on the fly before that texture read happens. No need to enable if corruption is not visible.

Values.Value: DECOMPRESS_DEPTH_ON_TEXTURE_READ - L2 from texture is unable to interpret non standard sample positions for depth, so we need to decompress them on the fly before that texture read happens. No need to enable if corruption is not visible.

Value.source: ALLOW_ONLY_ON_ALLOWLISTED_RATIOS - Enable the effect only on surfaces that are of the same aspect ratio as the backbuffer. This can be used to avoid applying interleaving on shadowmaps for games where DISABLE_ON_DENY_LISTED_RATIOS doesn't work.

Values.Value: ALLOW_ONLY_ON_ALLOWLISTED_RATIOS - Enable the effect only on surfaces that are of the same aspect ratio as the backbuffer. This can be used to avoid applying interleaving on shadowmaps for games where DISABLE_ON_DENY_LISTED_RATIOS doesn't work.

Value.source: ALLOW_ON_BIGGER_THAN_BACK_BUFFER - when ALLOW_ONLY_ON_ALLOWLISTED_RATIOS is set, by default interleaving is disabled on surfaces bigger than the backbuffer. Set this key to enable it for such surfaces that have same aspect ratio as backbuffer but are bigger. This setting has no effect if ALLOW_ONLY_ON_WHITELISTED_RATIOS isn't set.

Values.Value: ALLOW_ON_BIGGER_THAN_BACK_BUFFER - when ALLOW_ONLY_ON_ALLOWLISTED_RATIOS is set, by default interleaving is disabled on surfaces bigger than the backbuffer. Set this key to enable it for such surfaces that have same aspect ratio as backbuffer but are bigger. This setting has no effect if ALLOW_ONLY_ON_WHITELISTED_RATIOS isn't set.

Value.source: IGNORE_APP_PROFILE - if MAXWELL_B_SAMPLE_INTERLEAVE is ON and there is no app profile associated with the current executable, apply the effect nonetheless, used for testing purpose

Values.Value: IGNORE_APP_PROFILE - if MAXWELL_B_SAMPLE_INTERLEAVE is ON and there is no app profile associated with the current executable, apply the effect nonetheless, used for testing purpose

Value.source: PATCH_ATTRIBUTE_EVAL_OFFSETS - Always evaluating the attributes at pixel center causes corruptions with some games when run with MFAA and without MSAA. Setting this bit causes the driver to replace all IPA instructions with IPA.offset when the shader is used without MSAA which ensures the attribute evaluation happens at the same location as the jittered raster sample position.

Values.Value: PATCH_ATTRIBUTE_EVAL_OFFSETS - Always evaluating the attributes at pixel center causes corruptions with some games when run with MFAA and without MSAA. Setting this bit causes the driver to replace all IPA instructions with IPA.offset when the shader is used without MSAA which ensures the attribute evaluation happens at the same location as the jittered raster sample position.

Name.source: Experimental - Pipelined Copy for Sync CE

Setting.Name: Experimentell - Pipelined Copy for Sync CE

Description.source: Enable Pipelined Copy for Sync CE aka Pipelined + Flush_Enable = False , supports DX12 only

Setting.Description: Enable Pipelined Copy for Sync CE aka Pipelined + Flush_Enable = False , supports DX12 only

Value.source: DISABLE_PIPELINED_COPY - Disable Pipelining of syncCE copy aka Data Transfer Type is non-pipelined and Flush_enable set to true

Values.Value: DISABLE_PIPELINED_COPY - Disable Pipelining of syncCE copy aka Data Transfer Type is non-pipelined and Flush_enable set to true

Value.source: ENABLE_PIPELINED_COPY - Enable Pipelined Copy for Sync CE aka Pipelined + Flush_Enable = False

Values.Value: ENABLE_PIPELINED_COPY - Enable Pipelined Copy for Sync CE aka Pipelined + Flush_Enable = False

Name.source: Driver - Ansel Depth Buffer Detection Tuning

Setting.Name: Treiber - Ansel Tiefe Buffer Detection Tuning

Description.source: Toggle various settings useful for tuning how to identify Depth buffers in Ansel. More info: https://confluence.nvidia.com/display/NGX/Depth+Buffer+Detection+Design.

Setting.Description: Toggle various settings useful for tuning how to identify Depth buffers in Ansel. More info: https://confluence.nvidia.com/display/NGX/Depth+Buffer+Detection+Design.

Value.source: NONE - None of the depth settings will be enabled.

Values.Value: NONE - None of the depth settings will be enabled.

Value.source: USE_STATS - Use the Stats Mechanism to identify which buffer has Depth information.

Values.Value: USE_STATS - Use the Stats Mechanism to identify which buffer has Depth information.

Value.source: USE_VIEWPORT - Use Viewport ratio to compare with backbuffer ratio as a metric for determining whether a buffer has Depth.

Values.Value: USE_VIEWPORT - Use Viewport ratio to compare with backbuffer ratio as a metric for determining whether a buffer has Depth.

Value.source: VIEWPORT_SCALING - Use Viewport information to scale Depth image which is needed for games with Dynamic Resolution Scaling. Can only be used when USE_VIEWPORT is enabled.

Values.Value: VIEWPORT_SCALING - Use Viewport information to scale Depth image which is needed for games with Dynamic Resolution Scaling. Can only be used when USE_VIEWPORT is enabled.

Value.source: OVERRIDE_EN - Enable Depth Settings overrides for Y/Z Inversion.

Values.Value: OVERRIDE_EN - Enable Depth Settings overrides for Y/Z Inversion.

Value.source: INVERT_Y - Indicate whether a game's depth is inverted in Y-plane, if OVERRIDE_EN is set. Inverted means Bottom=1.0, Top = 0.0

Values.Value: INVERT_Y - Indicate whether a game's depth is inverted in Y-plane, if OVERRIDE_EN is set. Inverted means Bottom=1.0, Top = 0.0

Value.source: INVERT_Z - Indicate whether a game's depth is inverted in Z-plane, if OVERRIDE_EN is set. Inverted means Near=1.0, Far = 0.0

Values.Value: INVERT_Z - Indicate whether a game's depth is inverted in Z-plane, if OVERRIDE_EN is set. Inverted means Near=1.0, Far = 0.0

Value.source: ALL - All of the depth settings will be enabled.

Values.Value: ALL - All of the depth settings will be enabled.

Name.source: Driver - Hudless Buffer Copy Draw Call

Setting.Name: Treiber - Hudless Buffer Copy Draw Call

Description.source: Sets the draw call at which point the Hudless buffer will be copied, with the goal of selecting the last draw call before any HUD draws occur. More info: https://confluence.nvidia.com/display/NGX/Hudless+Buffer+Detection+Design.

Setting.Description: Sets the draw call at which point the Hudless buffer will be copied, with the goal of selecting the last draw call before any HUD draws occur. More info: https://confluence.nvidia.com/display/NGX/Hudless+Buffer+Detection+Design.

Setting.Name: Treiber - FRM Override Parameters

Description.source: FRM override parameters

Setting.Description: FRM override parameters

Values.Value: DISABLE_AND_IGNORE_REQUEST_MAXPERF - Disable FRM and ignore requesting max perf so that OPTP does not get disabled

Value.source: IGNORE_MULTI_DEVICE - Bypass refcounting. DO NOT SET FOR GAMES THAT ACTIVELY USE MULTIPLE DEVICES!!!

Values.Value: IGNORE_MULTI_DEVICE - Bypass refcounting. DO NOT SET FOR GAMES THAT ACTIVELY USE MULTIPLE DEVICES!!!

Setting.Name: Treiber - Quadro Optimization Deaktivieren

Description.source: disable Quadro optimization features

Setting.Description: disable Quadro optimization features

Values.Value: DISABLE - do not hide Quadro optimizations

Value.source: ENABLE - hide Quadro optimizations, act as a GeForce

Values.Value: ENABLE - hide Quadro optimizations, act as a GeForce

Name.source: Driver - Ansel Hudless Buffer Detection Tuning

Setting.Name: Treiber - Ansel Hudless Buffer Detection Tuning

Description.source: Toggle various settings useful for tuning how to identify Hudless buffers in Ansel. More info: https://confluence.nvidia.com/display/NGX/Hudless+Buffer+Detection+Design.

Setting.Description: Toggle various settings useful for tuning how to identify Hudless buffers in Ansel. More info: https://confluence.nvidia.com/display/NGX/Hudless+Buffer+Detection+Design.

Value.source: NONE - None of the hudless settings will be enabled.

Values.Value: NONE - None of the hudless settings will be enabled.

Value.source: USE_STATS - Use the Stats Mechanism to identify which buffer has Hudless information.

Values.Value: USE_STATS - Use the Stats Mechanism to identify which buffer has Hudless information.

Value.source: ONLY_SINGLE_RTV_BINDS - Toggle whether to restrict buffer candidates to those which are bound individually.

Values.Value: ONLY_SINGLE_RTV_BINDS - Toggle whether to restrict buffer candidates to those which are bound individually.

Value.source: RESTRICT_FORMATS - Toggle whether to restrict buffer candidates to specific colour formats.

Values.Value: RESTRICT_FORMATS - Toggle whether to restrict buffer candidates to specific colour formats.

Value.source: ALL - All of the hudless settings will be enabled.

Values.Value: ALL - All of the hudless settings will be enabled.

Setting.Name: Treiber - Hudless Buffer Heuristic Weights

Description.source: Key-value pair in the form 'string=uint32'. Each keyval pair delimited by comma. The weights can be used to fine-tune a game based on in-game heuristics for correctly finding the hudless buffer.

Setting.Description: Key-value pair in the form 'string=uint32'. Each keyval pair delimited by comma. The weights can be used to fine-tune a game based on in-game heuristics for correctly finding the hudless buffer.

Setting.Name: Treiber - NvCamera Capture Blocked Buffers

Description.source: Specifies which buffers are blocked from being captured in NvCamera. Specify multiple buffers by or'ing them tegether with '|'.

Setting.Description: Specifies which buffers are blocked from being captured in NvCamera. Specify multiple buffers by or'ing them tegether with '|'.

Value.source: NONE - Disables nothing. All buffers can be captured.

Values.Value: NONE - Disables nothing. All buffers can be captured.

Value.source: FINAL_COLOR - Disables Final Color buffer capture.

Values.Value: FINAL_COLOR - Disables Final Color buffer capture.

Value.source: ALL - Disables everything. No buffers can be captured other than the default present buffer.

Values.Value: ALL - Disables everything. No buffers can be captured other than the default present buffer.

Setting.Name: Plattform-Boost

Description.source: Enable AutoFL support.

Setting.Description: Aktiviert die AutoFL-Unterstützung.

Setting.Name: PS-Alpha/Beta-Strategie

Description.source: Set the behavior for Alpha/Beta performance strategy (static or dynamic)

Values.Value: Static - The driver always uses Alpha fraction set via PS_ALPHABETA_FRACTION

Value.source: Dynamic_VBIB - The driver adjusts a vb/ib ID unique Alpha fraction via AlphaBeta clocks

Values.Value: Dynamic_VBIB - The driver adjusts a vb/ib ID unique Alpha fraction via AlphaBeta clocks

Description.source: WDDM1.0+ DX9/DX10

Name.source: PS Dx10 Surface Placement Highest Priority Dx1x

Setting.Name: PS DX10 Oberflächenplatzierung mit höchster Priorität DX1x

Description.source: Normally, resources are capped at high priority. This regkey allows selective use of maximum priority, equivalent to D3DDDI_ALLOCATIONPRIORITY_MAXIMUM for these buffers.

Setting.Name: Shader-Cache - DLL-Pfad

Description.source: Specifies the DLL path used for shader disk cache association.

Setting.Description: Gibt den DLL-Pfad für die Zuordnung des Shader-Disk-Caches an.

Setting.Name: Leistungsindikatoren - DX9 Nur Export

Description.source: Limits driver performance counter export to DirectX 9 workloads.

Setting.Description: Begrenzt den Export von Treiber-Leistungsindikatoren auf DirectX-9-Arbeitslasten.

Setting.Name: Shader-Compiler - Offline-Kompilierung

Description.source: Controls whether the driver may use the offline shader compiler path.

Setting.Description: Steuert, ob der Treiber den Offline-Shader-Compilerpfad verwenden darf.

Setting.Name: iCafe - Logo-Konfiguration

Description.source: Controls driver-side iCafe logo presentation behavior.

Setting.Description: Steuert die treiberseitige Darstellung des iCafe-Logos.

Setting.Name: Battery Boost - Anwendungs-FPS Limit

Description.source: Sets the Battery Boost frame-rate limit for the application.

Setting.Description: Legt das Battery-Boost-Bildratenlimit für die Anwendung fest.

Setting.Name: Leistung Management - Externer Leisemodus

Description.source: Controls the external quiet-mode power policy.

Setting.Description: Steuert die Energieverwaltungsrichtlinie des externen Leisemodus.

Setting.Name: CUDA - Ausgeschlossene GPUs

Description.source: Lists universal GPU identifiers that should be excluded from CUDA device selection.

Setting.Description: Listet universelle GPU-Kennungen auf, die von der CUDA-Geräteauswahl ausgeschlossen werden sollen.

Setting.Name: NVIDIA Image Scaling - Qualitäts-Upscaling

Description.source: Controls NVIDIA Image Scaling quality upscaling.

Setting.Description: Steuert das Qualitäts-Upscaling von NVIDIA Image Scaling.

Setting.Name: Anwendungsprofil - Benachrichtigungs-Zeitlimit

Description.source: Selects how long application profile notifications remain visible.

Setting.Description: Legt fest, wie lange Anwendungsprofil-Benachrichtigungen sichtbar bleiben.

Setting.Name: Antialiasing - SLI AA

Description.source: Controls SLI antialiasing mode selection.

Setting.Description: Steuert die Auswahl des SLI-Antialiasing-Modus.

Setting.Name: Inaktive Anwendung - Dynamische FPS Limit

Description.source: Sets the dynamic frame-rate limit used when an application is considered idle.

Setting.Description: Legt das dynamische Bildratenlimit für als inaktiv geltende Anwendungen fest.

Setting.Name: Inaktive Anwendung - Schwellenzeit

Description.source: Sets the time threshold in seconds before idle-application frame-rate limiting is applied.

Setting.Description: Legt die Zeitschwelle in Sekunden fest, bevor die Bildratenbegrenzung für inaktive Anwendungen angewendet wird.

Setting.Name: Leistungsindikatoren - Export

Description.source: Controls whether driver performance counters are exported.

Setting.Description: Steuert, ob Treiber-Leistungsindikatoren exportiert werden.

Setting.Name: Variable Bildwiederholrate - Overlay-Indikator

Description.source: Controls the on-screen indicator for variable refresh rate activity.

Setting.Description: Steuert die Bildschirmanzeige für variable Bildwiederholratenaktivität.

Setting.Name: Latenzindikator - Automatische Ausrichtung

Description.source: Controls automatic alignment for the latency flash indicator.

Setting.Description: Steuert die automatische Ausrichtung des Latenzblitz-Indikators.

Setting.Name: GPU-Leistung - Maximalgrenze

Description.source: Defines the maximum GPU power value exposed to Direct3D and OpenGL driver paths.

Setting.Description: Definiert den maximalen GPU-Leistungswert für Direct3D- und OpenGL-Treiberpfade.

Setting.Name: Optimus - Kompatibilitätsflags

Description.source: Controls Optimus compatibility and application GPU-selection behavior.

Setting.Description: Steuert Optimus-Kompatibilität und GPU-Auswahlverhalten der Anwendung.

Setting.Name: Optimus - Maximale Auflösung

Description.source: Limits the maximum resolution allowed for Optimus application handling.

Setting.Description: Begrenzt die maximal zulässige Auflösung für die Optimus-Anwendungsverarbeitung.

Setting.Name: Optimus - Maximale Antialiasing-Stufe

Description.source: Limits the maximum antialiasing level allowed for Optimus application handling.

Setting.Description: Begrenzt die maximal zulässige Antialiasing-Stufe für die Optimus-Anwendungsverarbeitung.

Setting.Name: Stereo - Augen vertauschen

Description.source: Controls eye-order exchange for workstation stereo output.

Setting.Description: Steuert die Vertauschung der Augenreihenfolge für die Workstation-Stereoausgabe.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Telemetrie-Monitorstufe

Description.source: Selects the OpenGL telemetry monitor verbosity level.

Setting.Description: Wählt die Ausführlichkeitsstufe des OpenGL-Telemetriemonitors.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Stereo erzwingen

Description.source: Controls forced OpenGL stereo rendering.

Setting.Description: Steuert erzwungenes OpenGL-Stereo-Rendering.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Standard-Swap-Intervall

Description.source: Selects the default OpenGL swap interval and force policy.

Setting.Description: Wählt das Standard-OpenGL-Swap-Intervall und die Erzwingungsrichtlinie.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Bruchteil des Standard-Swap-Intervalls

Description.source: Selects the fractional scanline component for the OpenGL default swap interval.

Setting.Description: Wählt den Bruchteil der Scanline für das Standard-OpenGL-Swap-Intervall.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Vorzeichen des Standard-Swap-Intervalls

Description.source: Selects whether the OpenGL default swap interval fraction is applied as a positive or negative offset.

Setting.Description: Wählt, ob der Bruchteil des Standard-OpenGL-Swap-Intervalls als positiver oder negativer Versatz angewendet wird.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - GDI-Kompatibilität

Description.source: Selects OpenGL GDI compatibility preference.

Setting.Description: Wählt die OpenGL-GDI-Kompatibilitätspräferenz.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Texturfilterqualität

Description.source: Selects the OpenGL quality/performance bias for texture filtering and related quality enhancements.

Setting.Description: Wählt die OpenGL-Qualitäts-/Leistungsgewichtung für Texturfilterung und zugehörige Qualitätsverbesserungen.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Maximal zulässige Frames

Description.source: Limits the number of OpenGL frames the driver may queue ahead.

Setting.Description: Begrenzt die Anzahl der OpenGL-Frames, die der Treiber vorausplanen darf.

Setting.Name: OpenGL SLI - GPU-Multicast

Description.source: Controls availability of the OpenGL GPU multicast path for SLI and Mosaic configurations.

Setting.Description: Steuert die Verfügbarkeit des OpenGL-GPU-Multicastpfads für SLI- und Mosaic-Konfigurationen.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Deep-Farbe-Scanout

Description.source: Controls OpenGL deep-color scanout support.

Setting.Description: Steuert die OpenGL-Unterstützung für Deep-Color-Scanout.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Schweregradschwelle des Ereignisprotokolls

Description.source: Selects the minimum OpenGL event severity written to the driver event log.

Setting.Description: Wählt die minimale OpenGL-Ereignisschwere, die in das Treiberereignisprotokoll geschrieben wird.

Setting.Name: OpenGL - Implizite GPU-Affinität

Description.source: Controls implicit GPU affinity behavior for OpenGL contexts.

Setting.Description: Steuert das implizite GPU-Affinitätsverhalten für OpenGL-Kontexte.

Setting.Name: SLI - Visueller Indikator

Description.source: Controls the on-screen SLI split-frame rendering indicator.

Setting.Description: Steuert die Bildschirmanzeige für SLI-Split-Frame-Rendering.

Setting.Name: SLI - Rendermodus

Description.source: Selects the active SLI rendering distribution mode.

Setting.Description: Wählt den aktiven SLI-Rendering-Verteilungsmodus.

Value.source: Force AFR of SFR with 3-way AFR fallback

Values.Value: Force AFR of SFR with 3-way AFR fallback

Setting.Name: Steam - Anwendungs-ID

Description.source: Stores the Steam application identifier used for driver profile association.

Setting.Description: Speichert die Steam-Anwendungs-ID für die Zuordnung zum Treiberprofil.

Setting.Name: VAB - Standarddaten

Description.source: Selects the default vertex attribute buffer data pattern used when API defaults are requested.

Setting.Description: Wählt das Standarddatenmuster des Vertexattributpuffers, wenn API-Standardwerte angefordert werden.

Setting.Name: Variable Bildwiederholrate - Steuerung

Description.source: Controls whether the variable refresh rate path is enabled.

Setting.Description: Steuert, ob der Pfad für variable Bildwiederholrate aktiviert ist.

Setting.Name: Virtuelle Realität - Vorgerenderte Frames

Description.source: Sets the maximum number of frames the CPU may queue ahead for virtual reality rendering.

Setting.Description: Legt die maximale Anzahl der Frames fest, die die CPU für Virtual-Reality-Rendering vorausplanen darf.

Name.source: Write TO Host Staging Buffer Size

Setting.Name: Größe des Host-Schreib-Staging-Puffers

Description.source: Set size of write staging buffer. If key is set to zero it will be ignored

Setting.Description: Legt die Größe des Schreib-Staging-Puffers fest. Ist der Schlüssel null, wird er ignoriert.

Value.source: Default - Set size of write staging buffer. If key is set to zero it will be ignored

Values.Value: Standard - Legt die Größe des Schreib-Staging-Puffers fest. Ist der Schlüssel null, wird er ignoriert.
